case_title: STATE OF CA.EMPLOYMENT DEV.DEPT.TAX DIST.OFF VS HARRIS JOHN B.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,065.80 FILED BY STATE OF CA.EMPLOYMENT DEV.DEPT.TAX DIST.OFF AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS JOHN B. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-30-1989 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 01

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CA.EMPLOYMENT DEV.DEPT.TAX DIST.OFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARRIS JOHN B. $1,065.80 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,105.80 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
